notes: SHIP v1.14.331 - Fold in the 2 advisory nits from the .330 rd-review (phantom-rd-reviewer dry-run, both non-blocking). Polish only; no behavior change to the INSPECT-3D landing. NIT 1: cmd_resolveFirstRackElev's D1 deployment-sort block was wrapped in a silent `catch (_) {}` - now `catch (e) { phantom_logErr('cmd_resolveFirstRackElev:d1', e) }` so a deploy_loadRacks/sort throw is logged for field diagnosis; still degrades gracefully to the Master-order first rack (cabId stays Object.keys(racksByCab)[0]). NIT 2: the #cc-rackhero cyan literals now use the verified :root cyan-family tokens instead of hardcoded rgba - border rgba(92,242,255,0.16) -> var(--cyan-border-lo); radial glow rgba(40,224,255,0.05) -> var(--cyan-dim) (this ALSO fixes a real hue mismatch: 0.05 used #28e0ff, which is the boot/forge-scoped --cyan, NOT the page's :root --cyan #5cf2ff = rgb(92,242,255)); caption color #7fe9ff -> var(--cyan), matching the sibling lens children. All three tokens (--cyan #5cf2ff, --cyan-dim, --cyan-border-lo) verified defined on the GLOBAL :root (lines 60/66/77) that #pg-cmd inherits - NOT the --vio/--mag boot-only trap - so no mock-token risk; bare var() matches the house convention (sibling lens children use bare var(--cyan)). Net visual = negligible within-hue shift, more token-consistent + correct page cyan. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, sw.js ok, version.json valid, CSS brace net-0, three-stamp .330->.331 lockstep, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (#pg-cmd redesign-only, all edits redesign-scoped). DEVICE-VERIFY: folds into the .330 verify - Command hero rack-landing looks the same (cyan frame/glow/caption), plus if you ever see a D1 anomaly it now surfaces in SYS>ERRORS instead of silently. ROLLBACK: revert this commit (restores the literals + silent catch); .330 stands underneath.
